cta.membership: Unlock Pro on every platform with one membership

enclii.valueProp: Deploy anywhere you want, at a fraction of the cost. GitOps-native Kubernetes for teams that refuse vendor lock-in.
enclii.problem: Cloud hosting costs are spiraling out of control. Vercel charges $20/user/month for basic features. AWS is powerful but complex. And none of them give you true sovereignty over your infrastructure.
enclii.solution: Enclii is a sovereign cloud PaaS built on Kubernetes. Zero-config deploys, preview environments, built-in observability — all for $55/month instead of $2,000+. Your code, your servers, your rules.

connections.janua: Authentication layer for all Enclii-hosted apps

janua.valueProp: Enterprise SSO, MFA, and Passkeys — without giving up your users' data. Open source and self-hosted.
janua.problem: Authentication services like Auth0 and Okta charge per user, hold your data hostage, and force you into their cloud. Privacy-conscious teams need an alternative.
janua.solution: Janua is a self-hosted identity platform with enterprise SSO, SCIM provisioning, MFA, and Passkeys. Open source (AGPL-3.0), deploy it on your infrastructure, keep full control.

forgeSight.valueProp: AI-powered price discovery from 1,000+ vendors. Know exactly what fabrication should cost before you buy.
forgeSight.problem: Digital fabrication pricing is opaque. Every vendor quotes differently, there's no standardized pricing, and procurement teams waste hours comparing quotes manually.
forgeSight.solution: Forge Sight continuously harvests, normalizes, and benchmarks prices across 1,000+ vendors worldwide. Get real-time market intelligence for 3D printing, CNC, laser cutting, and more.

connections.dhanam: Feeds cost data into Dhanam financial planning

dhanam.valueProp: Unified personal and business budgeting with ESG insight — designed for the realities of Latin America.
dhanam.problem: LATAM founders juggle personal and business finances in different currencies with different tax regimes. Existing tools ignore regional needs: multi-currency support, informal income tracking, and ESG compliance.
dhanam.solution: Dhanam unifies personal and business financial management with native multi-currency support, ESG tracking, and tools built for LATAM's regulatory landscape.

connections.forgeSight: Receives fabrication cost data for financial planning
connections.cotiza: Imports quotes for business expense tracking

tezca.valueProp: Search, understand, and comply with Mexican law — powered by AI. 11,696 laws indexed and growing.
tezca.problem: Mexican regulatory compliance is a maze. Thousands of laws, norms, and standards scattered across government websites. Businesses waste weeks researching compliance requirements.
tezca.solution: Tezca indexes 11,696 Mexican laws and norms, making them searchable, cross-referenced, and actionable. AI-powered analysis helps you understand what applies to your business and how to comply.

features.3: Export in multiple formats (PDF, DOCX, JSON)

connections.avala: Regulatory requirements feed AVALA training curricula
connections.pravara: Compliance rules integrated into manufacturing workflows

techSpecs.apis: REST API with search, cross-reference, export

avala.valueProp: Design, deliver, and verify competency-based training — with DC-3 certificate generation and regulatory compliance.
avala.problem: Training organizations in Mexico need to meet CONOCER/EC standards and generate DC-3 certificates. Current tools are fragmented, manual, and don't verify competency properly.
avala.solution: AVALA is a platform for designing competency-based training aligned with EC/CONOCER standards. Auto-generates DC-3 certificates and issues verifiable credentials using Open Badges 3.0.

yantra4d.valueProp: Upload parametric OpenSCAD models, get instant 3D previews, export STL files. 40+ open-source designs in the commons.
yantra4d.problem: Parametric design tools are either expensive (SolidWorks), locked-in (Fusion 360), or command-line only (OpenSCAD). Sharing parametric designs is fragmented across forums and repos.
yantra4d.solution: Yantra4D is a web platform for parametric OpenSCAD models. Upload, preview in 3D, tweak parameters, and export STL — all in the browser. Powers a commons of 40+ open-source designs.

connections.cotiza: Export designs directly to Cotiza for instant quotes
connections.pravara: Send designs to Pravara-MES for fabrication

techSpecs.apis: REST API for model management and rendering

cotizaStudio.valueProp: Upload a design, select materials and processes, get an instant fabrication quote. Integrated with Forge Sight pricing intelligence.
cotizaStudio.problem: Getting a fabrication quote takes days. Upload a file, wait for someone to review it, negotiate back and forth. Pricing is inconsistent and opaque.
cotizaStudio.solution: Cotiza Studio automates the entire quoting process. Upload your design, select materials and processes, and get an instant price powered by Forge Sight's real-time market data.

connections.forgeSight: Real-time pricing data from Forge Sight

pravaraMes.valueProp: Track jobs, manage queues, and monitor production in real-time. Multi-protocol support for modern and legacy machines.
pravaraMes.problem: Small to mid-size fabrication shops still track production on whiteboards and spreadsheets. Machine status is unknown until someone walks over. Scheduling is manual.
pravaraMes.solution: Pravara-MES brings real-time production monitoring, job tracking, and queue management to digital fabrication shops. Connects to machines via OPC-UA, MQTT, and REST.

connections.tezca: Compliance rules applied to manufacturing workflows

penny.tagline: AI Assistant for the MADFAM Ecosystem
penny.valueProp: An AI assistant that understands every MADFAM platform and helps you orchestrate workflows across the entire ecosystem.
penny.problem: As the MADFAM ecosystem grows, navigating between platforms becomes complex. Users need a unified interface to discover capabilities, automate workflows, and get help.
penny.solution: PENNY is an AI assistant that lives across the entire MADFAM ecosystem. Chat naturally to trigger workflows, query data from any platform, and get contextual help.
